description: Example: run the loop against a simple coding task
commands: python -m src.main run "Create a Python module src/calculator.py with add, subtract, multiply, divide functions and a test file tests/test_calculator.py" --working-dir ./workspace --skip-board

iteration_1.task_executor: Decomposes into subtasks: create calculator.py, create tests, run tests
iteration_1.self_reviewer: Checks files exist, imports work, tests pass

iteration_2_if_needed.refiner: Addresses any failing tests or missing functions

sample_goals: Add a /health endpoint returning {status: ok} to src/app.py
Refactor src/utils.py to use dataclasses instead of dicts
Add input validation and error handling to the POST /users endpoint
Write unit tests for all functions in src/auth.py
Convert the callback-based API in src/db.js to async/await
